title: festuca geniculata
intro: Festuca geniculata, also known as bent grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its distinctive bent or curved leaves and stems. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Festuca geniculata include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and calming the nervous system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Festuca geniculata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
